overview.name: GraphQL Variations
overview.description:
This scenario verifies GraphQL request execution using variation data.
Test flow includes: 1. Load test data from variations CSV file. 2. Send GraphQL mutation for each variation row using request file. 3. Verify response status = 200 for each iteration. 4. Validate created book using variation-based expected file. 5. Send GraphQL query to retrieve book by title for each variation row using request file. 6. Verify response status = 200 for each iteration. 7. Validate retrieved book using variation-based expected file. 8. Reset in-memory GraphQL storage after all variation iterations.
This scenario validates: - Variation value injection into GraphQL request files - Variation value injection into expected file names - Stable repeated GraphQL execution using multiple variation rows

graphql.comment: Step 1-4. Create book using variation data
Step 8. Reset GraphQL storage after all variation iterations
